passes: Japan active-window data has JRA, NAR, and Banei represented.
Japan active-window candidate generation exists for JRA, NAR, and Banei.
A reviewed candidate bundle path exists with 19 records.
A candidate-to-overlay promotion script exists and only promotes approved records.
The public UI can continue to show the existing safe Japan active-window records.
fails_or_pending: Japan is not full-country coverage yet.
JRA is not all active-window JRA meetings beyond the seeded records.
NAR is not all local racing meetings across all NAR racecourses.
NAR exact first start times are not stored for the seeded NAR records.
Live fetch and parser-based automatic candidate discovery are not enabled for Japan.
The approved bundle is not yet wired as the public overlay replacement.
v0_gate.decision: Proceed from manual seed expansion to generator-based coverage review. Do not claim full Japan coverage.

user_facing_behavior.country_page: Japan page may show safe active-window records from the existing public overlay, but must not claim full Japan coverage.
user_facing_behavior.calendar_page: Calendar may show the seeded Japan active-window meetings, with partial coverage status.
user_facing_behavior.today_tomorrow_pages: Today and tomorrow pages may show Japan records when the generated timetable window contains matching dates.
user_facing_behavior.disclosure: Coverage must be described as partial active-window coverage until parser-backed refresh and fuller source coverage exist.

next_required_pr: PR-073 Hong Kong HKJC candidate generator
